findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "car_cancel_otp" references sensitive artifacts (password). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Send verification OTP code for car rental cancellation. Sends a one-time password to the registered phone number to authorize the cancellation process.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "bus_send_cancel_otp" references sensitive artifacts (password). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Send verification OTP code for bus ticket cancellation. Sends a one-time password to the registered phone number to authorize the bus ticket cancellation proces…

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "prompt:booking_detail" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Get detailed information about a specific booking using PNR and passenger last name (or reservation_id for car rentals). Ask the user for missing identifiers be…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

description: Send detailed car rental invoice via email. Delivers a comprehensive invoice with reservation details, pricing breakdown, and payment information to the registered email address.

labels.name: hotel_room_detail
labels.description: Get detailed room information, prices, and images for a specific hotel. Provides comprehensive hotel details including room types, pricing, facilities, images, and policies.

labels.name: hotel_search
labels.description: Search for hotels in a destination with comprehensive filtering and pagination options.

labels.name: hotel_weather_forecast
labels.description: Get weather forecast for hotel destinations and stay periods. Provides detailed weather predictions including temperature, precipitation, and outdoor activity conditions to help plan hotel stays and local activities.

labels.name: bus_cancel_viewonly
labels.description: Check bus ticket cancellation details and fees. Shows cancellation policies, refund amounts, applicable fees, and cancellation deadlines for the specified bus reservation.

labels.name: bus_send_cancel_otp
labels.description: Send verification OTP code for bus ticket cancellation. Sends a one-time password to the registered phone number to authorize the bus ticket cancellation process.

labels.name: bus_cancel_commit
labels.description: Complete the bus ticket cancellation process. Finalizes the cancellation using OTP verification and processes refunds according to the cancellation policy.

labels.name: bus_get_reservation_detail
labels.description: Retrieve comprehensive bus ticket details and reservation information. Provides booking details, journey information, passenger details, and travel instructions using PNR and passenger surname.

labels.name: bus_search
labels.description: Search for bus routes between cities. Find available buses with schedules, pricing, seat availability, and operator information for intercity travel.

labels.name: bus_reservation_reissue
labels.description: Generate a bus reservation reissue link using PNR. Allows passengers to modify their existing bus reservations.

labels.name: bus_weather_forecast
labels.description: Get weather forecast for bus travel destinations. Provides detailed weather predictions including temperature, precipitation, and road conditions to help plan bus journeys safely.

labels.name: bus_send_refund_mail
labels.description: Send an email with the bus refund confirmation using PNR.

labels.name: bus_send_ticket_mail
labels.description: Send bus ticket confirmation via email. Delivers ticket details including journey information, seat assignments, boarding instructions, and operator contact details to the registered email address.

labels.name: bus_send_invoice_mail
labels.description: Send an email with the bus invoice using PNR.

evidence.snippet: Get detailed information about a specific booking using PNR and passenger last name (or reservation_id for car rentals). Ask the user for missing identifiers be…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: flight_ticket_reissue, flight_get_reservation_detail, flight_allocate, bus_cancel_viewonly, bus_get_reservation_detail · Private data: car_cancel_otp, bus_send_cancel_otp, bus_send_ticket_mail · Public sink: flight_send_ticket_mail, flight_send_invoice_mail, car_cancel_otp, car_send_refund_mail, car_send_ticket_mail, car_send_invoice_mail, bus_send_cancel_otp, bus_send_refund_mail, bus_send_ticket_mail, bus_send_invoice_mail · Destructive: car_get_reservation_detail, car_rental_reservation_reissue, bus_reservation_reissue.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: flight_ticket_reissue, flight_get_reservation_detail, flight_allocate, bus_cancel_viewonly, bus_get_reservation_detail · Private data: car_cancel_otp, bus_send_cancel_otp, bus_send_ticket_mail · Public sink: flight_send_ticket_mail, flight_send_invoice_mail, car_cancel_otp, car_send_refund_mail, car_send_ticket_mail, car_send_invoice_mail, bus_send_cancel_otp, bus_send_refund_mail, bus_send_ticket_mail, bus_send_invoice_mail · Destructive: car_get_reservation_detail, car_rental_reservation_reissue, bus_reservation_reissue

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
